title: hieracium brigantum
intro: Hieracium brigantum, also known as mouse-ear hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hieracium brigantum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Hieracium brigantum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
